policyStatement: Beta security review manifests record release-runner evidence only; this template does not claim public beta readiness.

release.ciRunUrl: <required: CI run URL, release-runner run URL, or build record>

threatModelReviewed.evidence: <required: docs/threat-model.md review evidence, CI/run URL, command output, or build record>
